metadata.description: Sparse JD should not produce overconfident fit claims.

input_payload.job_description_text: Engineer needed. Build software. Collaborate with team.

expected_outputs.bad_behavior_to_catch: Confidently presenting a strong role match when the JD is too underspecified to justify it.
expected_outputs.acceptable_fallback_behavior: Use conservative language, keep the summary modest, and signal low-confidence fit rather than pretending specificity.
reviewer_guidance: Check whether the summary invents role specialization from almost no JD evidence.

metadata.description: Buzzword soup should not trigger irrelevant keyword chasing.

input_payload.job_description_text: AI cloud blockchain DevSecOps Kubernetes React platform transformation ninja. Must be world-class across everything.

expected_outputs.bad_behavior_to_catch: Chasing stray buzzwords and pulling in irrelevant frontend or design-system evidence to match noise.
expected_outputs.acceptable_fallback_behavior: Anchor on the strongest real evidence, omit noisy mismatches, and avoid keyword-stuffed summary language.
reviewer_guidance: Inspect whether the final output stays grounded in actual backend/platform evidence instead of vague buzzword matching.

metadata.description: Conflicting JD asks should force conservative fit handling rather than synthetic synthesis.

input_payload.job_description_text: Seeking a staff backend architect who is also a senior product designer, owns multi-region Go infrastructure, and leads enterprise sales engineering.

expected_outputs.bad_behavior_to_catch: Pretending one candidate cleanly satisfies mutually conflicting requirements.
expected_outputs.acceptable_fallback_behavior: Represent the strongest backend fit honestly, omit unsupported design or sales leadership claims, and keep confidence low.
reviewer_guidance: Look for summary inflation that resolves the JD contradiction by invention.

metadata.description: Duplicate accomplishments should not create artificial ranking confidence or one-story collapse.

input_payload.job_description_text: Senior backend engineer for API performance and reliability work.

expected_outputs.bad_behavior_to_catch: Treating duplicated resume evidence as multiple independent proofs and collapsing selection onto one repeated story.
expected_outputs.acceptable_fallback_behavior: Deduplicate strategically, keep breadth where possible, and avoid one-source domination from repeated phrasing.
reviewer_guidance: Check whether repeated latency claims crowd out broader evidence unfairly.

metadata.description: Vague profile bullets should not become polished fabricated strength.

input_payload.job_description_text: Platform engineer for ownership-heavy backend systems, delivery rigor, and cloud reliability.

expected_outputs.bad_behavior_to_catch: Inflating vague bullets into crisp ownership and impact claims not supported by source evidence.
expected_outputs.acceptable_fallback_behavior: Keep wording cautious, allow weak-fit signals, and avoid strong platform-ownership framing.
reviewer_guidance: Review whether the generated summary sounds more specific than the underlying bullets justify.

metadata.description: Mentoring signals should not turn into invented people-management authority.

input_payload.job_description_text: Director of Engineering leading 25 engineers across platform and product teams.

expected_outputs.bad_behavior_to_catch: Turning limited mentoring evidence into unsupported director-level leadership claims.
expected_outputs.acceptable_fallback_behavior: Retain mentoring/process signals only, or let verification block unsupported leadership phrasing.
reviewer_guidance: Check whether the final resume quietly upgrades mentoring into formal team management.

metadata.description: Absent tools should not be synthesized from adjacent experience.

input_payload.job_description_text: Rust and Kubernetes platform engineer building service mesh tooling and Terraform modules.

expected_outputs.bad_behavior_to_catch: Inferring unsupported Rust, Kubernetes, or Terraform depth from generic backend/cloud overlap.
expected_outputs.acceptable_fallback_behavior: Expose adjacent backend strengths honestly and let unsupported tool gaps remain visible.
reviewer_guidance: Inspect whether unsupported infrastructure tooling appears in the headline or summary.

metadata.description: Large strong profiles should not collapse into a single dominant story when breadth is available.

input_payload.job_description_text: Principal backend engineer for distributed systems, reliability, and multi-region platform work.

expected_outputs.bad_behavior_to_catch: Letting one current experience crowd out richer breadth from supporting projects and adjacent backend history.
expected_outputs.acceptable_fallback_behavior: Preserve breadth across recent experience and one relevant project without collapsing into one source.
reviewer_guidance: Check whether the multi-region project survives when strong current experience already exists.

metadata.description: Old frontend keyword overlap should not contaminate a backend/platform resume.

input_payload.job_description_text: Backend platform engineer for APIs, microservices, and one small internal admin UI.

expected_outputs.bad_behavior_to_catch: Using a stray UI keyword to justify old irrelevant frontend experience in a backend-focused resume.
expected_outputs.acceptable_fallback_behavior: Keep the resume backend-heavy and omit old frontend-only items despite token overlap.
reviewer_guidance: Verify that old jQuery and microsite work does not leak into the final resume.

metadata.description: Sparse junior profiles should not be inflated into senior platform fits.

input_payload.job_description_text: Senior platform engineer for distributed event pipelines, cloud reliability, and team leadership.

expected_outputs.bad_behavior_to_catch: Upgrading a sparse junior profile into a senior platform narrative because the pipeline completed cleanly.
expected_outputs.acceptable_fallback_behavior: Show a weak or partial fit honestly, keep scope narrow, and allow low-confidence or unsupported-scope warnings.
reviewer_guidance: Inspect whether the generated summary suggests seniority or distributed-systems ownership that the profile does not support.
